seats.name: gemma3-1b-tight_aggressive
seats.personality_description: Folds weak hands; raises strong ones. The textbook winning style.

seats.name: gemma3-1b-loose_aggressive
seats.personality_description: Plays many hands aggressively; raises and bluffs constantly.

seats.name: gemma3-1b-rock
seats.personality_description: Tight-passive. Plays only premium hands; never raises, never bluffs.

seats.name: gemma3-1b-calling_station
seats.personality_description: Loose-passive. Calls everything; rarely raises. Hard to bluff.

seats.name: gemma3-1b-bluffer
seats.personality_description: Bluffs with weak hands, slow-plays strong ones. Highly deceptive.
